verdict: Good high-level overview with clear goals and ownership, but lacks implementation details, timeline, and risk assessment.
strengths: Covers key aspects like data ingestion, real-time processing, anomaly detection, visualization, and compliance
weaknesses: Missing risk assessment and mitigation strategies
Lacks details on technology stack and implementation approach
top_fixes: Add a timeline or Gantt chart for milestones
Include a risk assessment section with mitigation plans
Specify technology stack and key architectural decisions
